sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37832" key="e)pagkulwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαγκῠλ-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n37832.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fitted with a thong,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βρόχος</foreign> Heraclas ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:14:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.14.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
